metadata.siteDescription: MediBoo is a health journal for the whole family: symptoms, fever, medications, doctor visits, and test results all in one place, always within reach.

site.tagline: Mobile health journal for the whole family

landing.eyebrow: A health journal that brings order to treatment
landing.title: Symptoms, fever, and medications recorded clearly, without the chaos.
landing.description: Add entries with date and time, set medication schedules with reminders, save visits, questions for the doctor, and attachments. Everything stays separate for each family profile.
landing.appPreviewAlt: MediBoo app preview: health journal and fever calendar
chips: Privacy first: no AI models trained on health data
App lock with PIN or Face ID / Touch ID

features.title: A health history you can actually keep under control.
features.description: MediBoo helps you track the course of illness and treatment over time: symptoms, medication doses, visits, and test results. Simple, clear, and focused on keeping data safe.

cards.title: Symptom and illness journal
cards.body: Record a runny nose, cough, pain, fever, and other symptoms with the exact time, so it is easy to reconstruct how the illness progressed.

cards.title: Treatment schedule and reminders
cards.body: Set the medication name, treatment period, and number of doses per day. Your phone will remind you when it is time to give the next dose.

cards.title: Visits, doctors, clinics, and attachments
cards.body: Add the reason for the visit, a list of questions, notes, and photos or PDFs. The app remembers doctors and clinics so future visits are quicker to add.

howItWorks.title: Three steps that bring calm during illness.
howItWorks.description: Entries take just a few seconds. When it is time for a visit or consultation, you have the full history ready, without guessing.
items: Choose a profile (child, adult, or pet) and add symptoms or temperature with the date and time.
Record a medication or set up a treatment schedule with dose reminders.
Prepare for the visit with questions for the doctor, notes, attachments, and a quick calendar overview of the history.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Below are answers about availability, privacy, and the fever dose calculator.

items.question: Does MediBoo work for the whole family?
items.answer: Yes. You can manage multiple profiles for children, adults, and even pets. Each profile has its own separate health history.

items.question: How do you protect health data privacy?
items.answer: MediBoo does not use any AI models to learn from health entries. The app also includes App Lock with a PIN or device biometrics. We do not collect personally identifying data such as full name.

items.question: Which guidelines is the fever dose calculator based on?
items.answer: The calculator uses weight-based dosing guidance (mg/kg). Source: World Health Organization (WHO), Pocket Book of Hospital Care for Children. This feature is for informational purposes only and does not replace medical advice.

cta.title: Start keeping your health journal on your phone.
cta.description: Record things faster. Make calmer decisions. Have the full history ready for the next visit.

testimonials.title: Parents say it saves nerves.
testimonials.description: In short: less trying to remember, more order. That is how MediBoo users describe it most often.

items.name: Marta K.
items.quote: When my kids had a fever, everything used to get mixed up in my head. Now I have it all hour by hour: temperature, medication, symptoms. Such a relief.

items.name: Daniel M.
items.quote: The best part is the dose reminders and having the full history in one place, without digging through notes and messages.

items.name: Sofia R.
items.quote: I go to the doctor with my notes and questions ready. I finally stop forgetting half the important things in the middle of stress.

items.name: Michal P.
items.quote: We added grandparents too, so medications and test results are all in one place. Surprisingly convenient in daily life.

items.name: Emma L.
items.role: Mom of 2 children and grandparents in the app
items.quote: The calendar is incredibly useful. You can instantly see how often and how high the fever went during a given month.

waitlist.title: Sign up for early access
waitlist.successBody: Thank you. You're now on the Android waitlist.
waitlist.consent: I agree to receive launch updates about the Android release.
waitlist.error: We could not save your request. Please try again in a moment.

footer.description: MediBoo helps organize symptoms, fever, medications, and doctor visits with privacy first, no AI, and app lock with PIN or biometrics.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms describe the basic rules for using the MediBoo website and mobile application.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information MediBoo processes and how it is used to support the service.

deleteData.title: Request permanent data deletion
deleteData.description: Fill out this form to request deletion of your MediBoo account data. We may contact you to confirm account ownership before the process is completed.
deleteData.note: Provide the email address used in the app and any details that will help us identify the account.
deleteData.instructionTitle: Where can I find my User ID?
deleteData.instructionDescription: Open Settings in the MediBoo app. At the bottom-left of the screen you will see your identifier in the format: User ID: MB-xxxxxxxx
deleteData.successBody: Thank you. We have received your request and will reply by email if needed.
deleteData.userIdPlaceholder: Your user ID in the app
deleteData.messagePlaceholder: Please delete all account data connected to this email address.
deleteData.error: We could not send the form. Please try again.
